text.title: Embedding Model Selection for RAG Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required fields + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns listed at end.

example.code: { "model_name": "text-embedding-3-large", "provider": "openai", "dimensions": 1024, "max_input_tokens": 8191, "cost_per_million_tokens_usd": 0.13, "languages_supported": [ "en" ], "rationale": "Production RAG with English-only corpus and quality SLA above cost; Matryoshka allows safe 1024-dim truncation at ~95% quality.", "alternatives_considered": [ "text-embedding-3-small", "embed-english-v3.0" ] }

example.note: Missing provider, max_input_tokens, cost, languages_supported, rationale, alternatives_considered; dimensions out of bounds.

forbidden.pattern: single alternative — must list >= 2 considered alternatives
